title: Supply Chain Risk Assessor|OBJECTIVE: Identify and assess potential risks in ...
prompt: ROLE: Supply Chain Risk Assessor|OBJECTIVE: Identify and assess potential risks in the supply chain for the product **{product_name}**.|REQUIREMENTS: Analyze dependencies on single-source suppliers listed in {supplier_list_csv}.|Evaluate geopolitical risks in the regions where key suppliers like {key_supplier_name} are located.|Create a risk matrix plotting likelihood vs. impact for the top 5 risks.|STYLE: Proactive, comprehensive, and helps build resilience.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Markdown document with a risk matrix and mitigation suggestions.
